sections.paragraph:
Original: כּלנו כּלנה כּלנה

Transliteration: kalneh kalnêh kalnô

Phonetic: kal-neh'

BDB Definition:

Calneh or Calno = "fortress of Anu"
  1. a city of Babylonia named among the cities of Nimrod
    1. maybe modern 'Niffer'
  2. an Assyrian city near Aleppo
    1. maybe same as 1 since it was captured by Assyria in the 8th century BC

Origin: of foreign derivation

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
